## Notes

**verdict: good.** Knowledge multimedia hub (#13976) verified. Single uniform
"Knowledge" ViewHeader (icon-only back) — NO double header. Media-format FACETS
render with whole-store per-facet counts: All / Docs / Images / Audio / Video /
Transcripts (Transcripts+Files folded into facets exactly per #13976). Scope
filter row: All / Global / Owner / User / Agent. Document row (Quarterly Plan.md
— Global — MARKDOWN — Editable). "Add" button orange. Designed empty states for
empty facets (PagePanel.Empty). Overlay reads "Search knowledge..." (contextual
composer). Orange accent only, no blue. Clean.
